title: scBench-Long: Verifiable Benchmarking of Long-Horizon Single-Cell Biology
abstract: arXiv:2606.26563v1 Announce Type: cross  Abstract: Single-cell studies require analysts to convert raw measurements into specific biological claims through multi-step workflows and integration of metadata, assay context, and auxiliary evidence. Existing AI-biology benchmarks largely measure broad knowledge, executable workflows, or local analysis steps. We introduce scBench-Long, a benchmark for long-horizon single-cell biology in which agents must recover scientific conclusions from raw or near-raw data without prescribed methods. The benchmark contains 21 evaluations spanning melanoma CD8 T-cell reactivity, CD8 RNA+ATAC regulatory inference, human--monkey chimera development, KRAS-driven lung tumor aging, and lethal COVID-19 lung pathology. Tasks cover paired scRNA/TCR sequencing, RNA and chromatin profiling, cross-species transcriptomics, combinatorial scRNA-seq, single-nucleus RNA-seq, immune repertoires, ortholog maps, ligand--receptor resources, and validation evidence. Candidate

Title: scBench-Long: Verifiable Benchmarking of Long-Horizon Single-Cell Biology
Abstract: arXiv:2606.26563v1 Announce Type: cross  Abstract: Single-cell studies require analysts to convert raw measurements into specific biological claims through multi-step workflows and integration of metadata, assay context, and auxiliary evidence. Existing AI-biology benchmarks largely measure broad knowledge, executable workflows, or local analysis steps. We introduce scBench-Long, a benchmark for long-horizon single-cell biology in which agents must recover scientific conclusions from raw or near-raw data without prescribed methods. The benchmark contains 21 evaluations spanning melanoma CD8 T-cell reactivity, CD8 RNA+ATAC regulatory inference, human--monkey chimera development, KRAS-driven lung tumor aging, and lethal COVID-19 lung pathology. translated_title: scBench-Long：长周期单细胞生物学的可验证基准测试
translated_abstract: 单细胞研究要求分析人员通过多步骤工作流程，结合元数据、实验背景和辅助证据，将原始测量结果转化为特定的生物学论断。现有的人工智能-生物学基准主要衡量广泛知识、可执行工作流程或局部分析步骤。我们引入了scBench-Long，这是一个面向长周期单细胞生物学的基准测试，在该测试中，智能体必须从原始或接近原始的数据中恢复科学结论，而无需预设方法。该基准包含21项评估，涵盖黑色素瘤CD8 T细胞反应性、CD8 RNA+ATAC调控推断、人-猴嵌合体发育、KRAS驱动的肺肿瘤老化以及致死性COVID-19肺部病理学。任务涵盖配对scRNA/TCR测序、RNA和染色质分析、跨物种转录组学、组合scRNA-seq、单核RNA-seq、免疫组库、直系同源图谱、配体-受体资源以及验证证据。
tldr: 提出了一个无需预设方法、从原始数据中恢复科学结论的长周期单细胞生物学基准测试，包含21项覆盖多种生物场景的评估任务。
en_tdlr: We propose scBench-Long, a benchmark for long-horizon single-cell biology that requires agents to recover scientific conclusions from raw data without prescribed methods, encompassing 21 evaluations across diverse biological scenarios.
